properties.name: thymeleaflet.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable Thymeleaflet. Set false in production profiles to prevent exposing the development UI.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.resources.template-paths
properties.description: Classpath template roots scanned for application fragments. Keep this to trusted application template locations.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.resources.stylesheets
properties.description: Stylesheet URLs injected into preview iframes so rendered fragments match the host application.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.resources.scripts
properties.description: Script URLs injected into preview iframes for interactive fragment previews.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.resources.cache-duration-seconds
properties.description: Cache duration in seconds for static Thymeleaflet resources.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.cache.enabled
properties.description: Enable Thymeleaflet in-memory caches for fragment discovery, JavaDoc parsing, type extraction, and dependency analysis.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.cache.preload
properties.description: Warm Thymeleaflet caches at startup when caching is enabled.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.preview.background-light
properties.description: Light background color for the preview canvas

properties.name: thymeleaflet.preview.background-dark
properties.description: Dark background color for the preview canvas

properties.name: thymeleaflet.preview.viewports
properties.description: Viewport presets (name + width + height), excluding Fit

properties.name: thymeleaflet.preview.viewports[].id
properties.description: Stable viewport preset identifier used by the preview control.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.preview.viewports[].label
properties.description: Human-readable viewport preset label shown in the preview control.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.preview.viewports[].label-key
properties.description: Message key for localized viewport preset labels.

properties.name: thymeleaflet.security.auto-permit
properties.description: When true, registers a minimal SecurityFilterChain to permit /thymeleaflet/**. Intended for development quick starts; avoid in production.
